achievements.desc: Light up the Windrest Peak map in Mondstadt.

achievements.desc: Light up the Temple of Space map in Mondstadt.

achievements.name: Tagelieder for Tithonus
achievements.desc: Unlock all Teleport Waypoints at Windrest Peak and the Temple of Space in Mondstadt.

achievements.desc: Open 45 chests at Windrest Peak and the Temple of Space.

achievements.desc: Open 90 chests at Windrest Peak and the Temple of Space.

achievements.desc: Open 180 chests at Windrest Peak and the Temple of Space.

achievements.name: Adventurer of the Interstice
achievements.desc: Complete 7 Open World Time Trial Challenges at Windrest Peak and the Temple of Space.

achievements.name: Adventurer of the Interstice
achievements.desc: Complete 14 Open World Time Trial Challenges at Windrest Peak and the Temple of Space.

achievements.name: Adventurer of the Interstice
achievements.desc: Complete 28 Open World Time Trial Challenges at Windrest Peak and the Temple of Space.

achievements.name: Guide of the Interstice
achievements.desc: Follow 3 Seelie at Windrest Peak and the Temple of Space to their Seelie Courts.

achievements.name: Space and Unfree Will
achievements.desc: Upgrade the Memory Core in the Temple of Space to its maximum level.

achievements.name: To a Heart That's True
achievements.desc: Break the seals at the Noblesse Secret Treasury at Windrest Peak and in the Secret Hall of the Realms at the Temple of Space.

achievements.name: Three Reunions and a Farewell
achievements.desc: Find all of Zeitlind's lost belongings.

achievements.name: Farewell, Magic Mountain
achievements.desc: Complete "A Long Day in the Mountains."
